---
title: "Home Vibe"
description: |
  How do you live?
date: '2026-02-10'
image: "home.jpg"
categories:
    - Home
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 7

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Utility")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Décor")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Vibe")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Atmosphere")
```
